title: November 1
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 1''' is the 305th day of the year (306th in leap years), with 60 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1942|1942]] – [[Michael Fleisher]] is born.
*[[1940s#1946|1946]] – [[Dennis Muren]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[Mark Budz]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Daran Norris]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 39|''Star Wars Weekly'' 39]] published.
*[[1979]] – [[The Art of Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope|''The Art of Star Wars'']] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Natalia Tena]] is born.
*[[1986]] – "[[The Season Scepter]]" of [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] airs on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*[[1993]] – ''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' hardcover published.
*1993 – [[Classic Star Wars 14|''Classic Star Wars'' 14]] published.
*[[1994]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 2|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 2]] published.
*1994 – [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 4|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 4]] is published.
*1994 – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 4|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 4]] published.
*1994 – ''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' paperback published.
*[[1995]] – ''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' published.
*1995 – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 8|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 8]] published.
*[[1996]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 2]] published.
*[[1997]] – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 15|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 15]] published.
*1997 – ''[[Star Wars Kids 3 (1997)]]'' released.
*1997 – ''[[Star Wars Missions 3: Attack on Delrakkin]]'' published.
*[[1998]] – ''[[Star Wars Missions 15: Voyage to the Underworld]]'' published.
*[[2000]] – [[Darth Maul (2000) 3|''Darth Maul'' (2000) 3]] published.
*2000 – ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook]]'' published by [[Wizards of the Coast]].
*2000 – ''[[Star Wars: Invasion of Theed Adventure Game]]'' published.
*[[2001]] – [[Anne Polland]] dies.
*[[2002]] – ''[[Boba Fett: Crossfire]]'' hardcover published.
*2002 – ''[[Jedi Quest: The Master of Disguise]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Jedi Quest: The Moment of Truth]]'' published.
*[[2004]] – ''[[Jedi Quest: The Final Showdown]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']] is released on DVD.
*2005 – ''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]'' released on [[Wikipedia:Xbox|Xbox]], [[Wikipedia:PlayStation 2|PlayStation 2]], and [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]].
*2005 – ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]'' expansion released.
*[[2006]] – [[Legacy (2006) 5|''Legacy'' (2006) 5]] published.
*2006 – [[Star Wars Insider 91|''Star Wars Insider'' 91]] published.
*[[2007]] – Chapter 7 went live in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided]]''.
*2007 – [[Production IG]] founded.
*[[2016]] – ''[[Trapped in the Death Star!]]'' published.
*2016 – ''[[Star Wars: Aliens and Ships of the Galaxy]]'' published.
*2016 – ''[[Luke and the Lost Jedi Temple]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – [[Darth Vader (2017) 7|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 7]] published.
*2017 – "[[Crash Course]]" airs on YouTube.
*2017 – [[Sutā Wōzu Kūso Kagaku Dokuhon (2017)|''Sutā Wōzu Kūso Kagaku Dokuhon'' (2017)]] published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars: Alien Archive]]'' published in the UK.
*[[2022]] – [[Star Wars: Halcyon Legacy (TPB)|''Star Wars: Halcyon Legacy'' trade paperback]] published.
*2022 – ''[[The High Republic: Quest for the Hidden City]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[The Old Republic: Deceived]]'' republished as part of ''[[The Essential Legends Collection]]''.
*2022 – ''[[The Old Republic: Revan]]'' republished as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2022 – ''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]'' republished as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2022 – [[X-Wing: The Bacta War (unabridged audiobook)|''X-Wing: The Bacta War'' unabridged audiobook]] released as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2022 – "[[Gungan (episode)|Gungan]]" and "[[Loth-Cat]]" premiere on the [[StarWarsKids.com|Star Wars Kids]] YouTube channel.
*[[2023]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 40|''Star Wars'' (2020) 40]] published.
*2023 – [[Hyperspace Stories 10|''Hyperspace Stories'' 10]] published.
<noinclude>
